title.en: Rail and Combined-Mode Radios: RCC LMR, RCC DSSS BPSK and CMB PHYs
title.zh: 轨道与组合模式无线电：RCC LMR、RCC DSSS BPSK 与 CMB PHY

blocks.en: Most of 802.15.4 targets short-range home and industrial links. But the same standard also reserves room for radios that live in very specific worlds. This lesson covers three of those specialized PHYs (physical layers). The RCC LMR PHY (Rail Communications and Control, Land Mobile Radio) is a narrow-band radio for railway operations. The RCC DSSS BPSK PHY is a sibling that reuses an existing spreading scheme. And the CMB PHY (combined PHY) bundles two modulations — O-QPSK and GFSK — for medical and combined-band use. We will treat all three as one coverage map: walk the headline ideas in prose, then file every remaining clause in a deepdive.
blocks.zh: 802.15.4 的大部分内容面向家庭与工业的短距离链路。但同一份标准也为生活在非常特定场景中的无线电预留了空间。本课讲解其中三种专用 PHY（物理层）。RCC LMR PHY（铁路通信与控制，陆地移动无线电）是面向铁路运营的窄带无线电。RCC DSSS BPSK PHY 是它的同族，复用了已有的扩频方案。而 CMB PHY（组合 PHY）则把两种调制方式 —— O-QPSK 与 GFSK —— 捆绑在一起，用于医疗与组合频段场景。我们把三者作为一张覆盖地图来对待：先在正文中走一遍核心思想，再在深入解读里安放每一个剩余条款。

blocks.en: RCC stands for Rail Communications and Control. The LMR PHY is the workhorse: every RCC device must support LMR with GMSK modulation at 9.6 kb/s, and that mode is also the reference used when computing acknowledgment-frame timing (clause 28.1). Think of it as the mandatory baseline that everything else builds around.
blocks.zh: RCC 代表铁路通信与控制（Rail Communications and Control）。LMR PHY 是其主力：每台 RCC 设备都必须支持采用 GMSK 调制、速率 9.6 kb/s 的 LMR，而该模式同时也是计算确认帧时序时所用的基准（条款 28.1）。可以把它理解为其他一切围绕其构建的强制基线。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 660 110" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="10" y="30" width="90" height="40"/><rect x="100" y="30" width="60" height="40"/><rect x="160" y="30" width="70" height="40"/><rect x="230" y="30" width="60" height="40"/><rect x="290" y="30" width="120" height="40"/><rect x="410" y="30" width="90" height="40"/><rect x="500" y="30" width="90" height="40"/><rect x="590" y="30" width="60" height="40"/><text x="55" y="54" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">SHR</text><text x="130" y="50" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">FEC Type</text><text x="130" y="62" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">+ Length</text><text x="195" y="54" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">CRC-8</text><text x="260" y="50" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">PHR FEC</text><text x="260" y="62" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Tail</text><text x="350" y="54" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">PSDU Payload</text><text x="455" y="50" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">Payload</text><text x="455" y="62" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">FEC Tail</text><text x="545" y="54" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Pad</text><text x="620" y="54" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Tail</text><text x="130" y="20" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">PHR</text><text x="450" y="20" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">PHY payload</text></svg>

caption.en: RCC LMR PPDU (Figure 28-1): the SHR (synchronization header) is followed by the PHR (PHY header) carrying Data FEC Type, Data Length and a CRC-8; then the PSDU payload, optional FEC tail and pad bits, and three tail bits for GMSK.
caption.zh: RCC LMR PPDU（图 28-1）：SHR（同步头）之后是 PHR（PHY 头），其中携带数据 FEC 类型、数据长度与一个 CRC-8；接着是 PSDU 载荷、可选的 FEC 尾比特与填充比特，以及用于 GMSK 的三个尾比特。

blocks.en: Walk the LMR frame left to right. The SHR (synchronization header) is a known bit pattern the receiver locks onto; clause 28.2.2 picks its exact value from a table keyed by modulation and whether the PHR is FEC-coded. The PHR (PHY header, clause 28.2.3) holds a Data FEC Type field (which coding rate the payload uses), a Data Length field (octet count, sent most-significant-byte first), and an 8-bit CRC over those, with six FEC tail bits appended only when the header itself is FEC-protected. The PHY payload (28.2.4) carries the PSDU plus an optional payload FEC tail and pad bits, sized so the total is a whole number of interleaver blocks. Finally, GMSK adds three zero tail bits (28.2.5).
blocks.zh: 从左到右走一遍 LMR 帧。SHR（同步头）是接收机用来锁定的已知比特图案；条款 28.2.2 根据调制方式以及 PHR 是否经过 FEC 编码，从一张表中选定其确切取值。PHR（PHY 头，条款 28.2.3）包含数据 FEC 类型字段（载荷使用哪种编码速率）、数据长度字段（八位组计数，高字节先发）以及覆盖这些字段的 8 比特 CRC；只有当头部本身受 FEC 保护时，才在其后附加六个 FEC 尾比特。PHY 载荷（28.2.4）携带 PSDU，外加可选的载荷 FEC 尾比特与填充比特，其大小要使总长度为交织块的整数倍。最后，GMSK 再追加三个零尾比特（28.2.5）。

blocks.en: Between the framing and the antenna sits a chain of signal-processing steps. FEC (forward error correction, clause 28.3) uses a rate-1/2 convolutional code with generator polynomials 133 and 171 (octal); higher rates such as 7/8, 3/4 and 2/3 come from puncturing — selectively dropping coded bits. An interleaver (28.4) shuffles the coded payload to spread out burst errors, and is enabled exactly when FEC is. Data whitening (28.5) is optional and applies a PN9 scrambling sequence to the PHR and payload so the bitstream looks random, which helps the receiver recover the clock. The reference modulator diagram (28.7) ties these stages together and requires every PPDU field to use the same symbol rate and modulation.
blocks.zh: 在成帧与天线之间，是一连串信号处理步骤。FEC（前向纠错，条款 28.3）采用速率 1/2 的卷积码，生成多项式为 133 与 171（八进制）；7/8、3/4、2/3 等更高速率通过删余（puncturing）实现 —— 即有选择地丢弃部分编码比特。交织器（28.4）打乱已编码载荷，以分散突发错误，并且恰在启用 FEC 时启用。数据白化（28.5）为可选项，对 PHR 与载荷施加 PN9 扰码序列，使比特流看起来随机，有助于接收机恢复时钟。参考调制器框图（28.7）把这些阶段串联起来，并要求 PPDU 的每个字段都使用相同的符号率与调制方式。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  A[Payload + PHR] --> B[CRC-8]
  B --> C[FEC rate 1/2 + puncture]
  C --> D[Interleaver]
  D --> E[Data whitening PN9]
  E --> F[Bit-to-symbol map]
  F --> G[Modulation]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  A[载荷 + PHR] --> B[CRC-8]
  B --> C[FEC 速率1/2 + 删余]
  C --> D[交织器]
  D --> E[数据白化 PN9]
  E --> F[比特到符号映射]
  F --> G[调制]

blocks.en: The LMR PHY is unusual in offering a whole menu of modulations (clause 28.6) so an operator can trade robustness for speed. GMSK (28.6.1) is the mandatory mode — a constant-envelope FSK with a Gaussian filter (BT ≈ 0.3) where a one shifts the carrier up and a zero shifts it down. 4-FSK (28.6.2) packs two bits per symbol using four frequency levels and shaping filters. QPSK (28.6.3) and pi/4 DQPSK (28.6.4) map two bits onto carrier phases through a root-raised-cosine filter (roll-off 0.25), the differential variant encoding data as phase changes. DSSS DPSK (28.6.5) spreads each bit across a chip sequence (lengths 11 to 40) at chip rates from 300 kcps up to 4 Mcps, in either DBPSK or DQPSK form.
blocks.zh: LMR PHY 的不寻常之处在于它提供一整份调制菜单（条款 28.6），让运营方在稳健性与速度之间权衡。GMSK（28.6.1）是强制模式 —— 一种带高斯滤波器（BT ≈ 0.3）的恒包络 FSK，比特 1 使载波频率上移、比特 0 使其下移。4-FSK（28.6.2）借助四个频率电平与成形滤波器，每符号承载两比特。QPSK（28.6.3）与 pi/4 DQPSK（28.6.4）通过根升余弦滤波器（滚降系数 0.25）把两比特映射到载波相位上，其中差分变体把数据编码为相位变化。DSSS DPSK（28.6.5）以 300 kcps 到 4 Mcps 的码片速率，用一段码片序列（长度 11 至 40）对每个比特做扩频，可采用 DBPSK 或 DQPSK 形式。

blocks.en: RF requirements (clause 28.8) keep these radios interoperable. The transmitter symbol-rate error must stay within ±5 parts per million (28.8.1); channel switching must finish within 500 microseconds (28.8.2); and when using QPSK or pi/4 DQPSK the error vector magnitude must be under 35% over 1000 symbols (28.8.3). Receiver sensitivity, interference rejection and maximum input level are all left implementation-specific (28.8.4–28.8.6). Both TX-to-RX and RX-to-TX turnaround times must be at most five symbols (28.8.7, 28.8.8), and the PHY must provide energy-detection and link-quality-indicator measurements (28.8.9, 28.8.10).
blocks.zh: RF 要求（条款 28.8）保证这些无线电之间的互操作性。发射机符号率误差须保持在 ±5 ppm 以内（28.8.1）；信道切换须在 500 微秒内完成（28.8.2）；使用 QPSK 或 pi/4 DQPSK 时，在 1000 个符号上测得的误差矢量幅度须低于 35%（28.8.3）。接收机灵敏度、干扰抑制与最大输入电平均留给具体实现决定（28.8.4–28.8.6）。TX 到 RX 与 RX 到 TX 的转换时间都须不超过五个符号（28.8.7、28.8.8），并且该 PHY 须提供能量检测与链路质量指示测量（28.8.9、28.8.10）。

blocks.en: The second rail radio, the RCC DSSS BPSK PHY (clause 29), is delightfully short. It is specified only for RCC applications (29.1) and is almost entirely a reuse: it employs the BPSK PHY of Clause 14, with the single change that the bit-to-chip mapping is replaced by a new 15-chip table (29.2). One reused base PHY plus one swapped lookup table — that is the whole specification, which keeps implementation cost low.
blocks.zh: 第二种铁路无线电 —— RCC DSSS BPSK PHY（条款 29）—— 短得令人欣喜。它仅为 RCC 应用而规定（29.1），且几乎完全是复用：它沿用第 14 章的 BPSK PHY，唯一的改动是把比特到码片的映射替换为一张新的 15 码片表（29.2）。一个被复用的基础 PHY，加上一张被替换的查找表 —— 这就是它的全部规范，从而把实现成本压得很低。

blocks.en: The CMB (combined) PHY in clause 30 packs two modulation families into the same operating bands (around 195, 416 and 619 MHz, used for medical telemetry). The CMB O-QPSK variant (30.1) reuses DSSS spreading: its PPDU has a 4-octet preamble, an SFD, and a PHR (30.1.1) carrying Spreading Mode and Rate Mode fields (250 or 500 kb/s) plus a header check sequence. The PSDU is spread with (16,4) or (8,4) DSSS bit-to-chip mapping, then optionally chip-whitened with an m-sequence (m = 9) before O-QPSK modulation with a raised-cosine pulse of roll-off 0.8 (30.1.2). Its RF limits (30.1.3) include a transmit PSD mask, sensitivity around -85 dBm, ±40 ppm frequency tolerance, at least -3 dBm transmit power, and an 8-symbol CCA detection time.
blocks.zh: 第 30 章中的 CMB（组合）PHY 把两个调制家族塞进同一组工作频段（约 195、416 与 619 MHz，用于医疗遥测）。CMB O-QPSK 变体（30.1）复用 DSSS 扩频：其 PPDU 含一个 4 八位组前导、一个 SFD，以及携带扩频模式与速率模式字段（250 或 500 kb/s）外加头校验序列的 PHR（30.1.1）。PSDU 用 (16,4) 或 (8,4) 的 DSSS 比特到码片映射进行扩频，随后在 O-QPSK 调制（采用滚降系数 0.8 的升余弦脉冲）之前，可选地用一段 m 序列（m = 9）做码片白化（30.1.2）。其 RF 限制（30.1.3）包括发射 PSD 模板、约 -85 dBm 的灵敏度、±40 ppm 的频率容差、至少 -3 dBm 的发射功率，以及 8 符号的 CCA 检测时间。

blocks.en: The CMB GFSK variant (30.2) is the FSK half of the combined PHY. Its PPDU reuses an existing format except for a redefined PHR (30.2.1): a preamble of up to 30 repetitions of "01010101", a 2-octet SFD whose value signals whether the packet is FEC-coded, and a PHR with FCS Type, Data Whitening and Frame Length fields. Modulation (30.2.2) is 2-level Gaussian-filtered FSK with BT = 0.7; five operating modes span 50 to 200 kb/s; FEC is optional (RSC or NRNSC). Data whitening reuses the standard scrambler (30.2.3). RF requirements (30.2.4) set ±20 ppm clock tolerance, at least -3 dBm transmit power, a stepped transmit spectral mask, plus the usual turnaround, ED, LQI and CCA rules.
blocks.zh: CMB GFSK 变体（30.2）是这套组合 PHY 中的 FSK 部分。除重新定义的 PHR（30.2.1）外，其 PPDU 复用了已有格式：前导由最多 30 次重复的 “01010101” 组成，一个 2 八位组的 SFD（其取值指示该包是否经 FEC 编码），以及含 FCS 类型、数据白化与帧长度字段的 PHR。调制（30.2.2）为 BT = 0.7 的二电平高斯滤波 FSK；五种工作模式覆盖 50 至 200 kb/s；FEC 为可选（RSC 或 NRNSC）。数据白化复用标准扰码器（30.2.3）。RF 要求（30.2.4）规定 ±20 ppm 的时钟容差、至少 -3 dBm 的发射功率、一条阶梯式发射频谱模板，以及常规的转换时间、ED、LQI 与 CCA 规则。

summary.en: Full coverage map: every clause of the RCC LMR, RCC DSSS BPSK and CMB PHYs
summary.zh: 完整覆盖地图：RCC LMR、RCC DSSS BPSK 与 CMB PHY 的每个条款

blocks.en: RCC LMR PHY (Clause 28): 28.1 overview makes LMR-GMSK-9.6 kb/s mandatory and the Ack-timing reference. 28.2 PPDU format — 28.2.1 general (Figure 28-1); 28.2.2 SHR (Table 28-1 selects the value by modulation and PHR coding); 28.2.3 PHR (Data FEC Type, Data Length MSB-first, CRC-8, six PHR FEC tail bits when coded); 28.2.4 PHY payload (optional payload FEC tail, pad to an interleaver-block multiple); 28.2.5 tail bits (three zeros for GMSK). 28.3 FEC (rate-1/2 convolutional, polys 133/171 octal, puncturing for 7/8, 3/4, 2/3). 28.4 interleaver (on when FEC is on). 28.5 data whitening (optional PN9, not reset between PHR and PSDU). 28.6 modulation — 28.6.1 GMSK, 28.6.2 4-FSK, 28.6.3 QPSK, 28.6.4 pi/4 DQPSK, 28.6.5 DSSS DPSK (DBPSK/DQPSK, spreading lengths 11-40, chip rates 300 kcps-4 Mcps). 28.7 reference modulator. 28.8 RF requirements — 28.8.1 symbol-rate tolerance ±5e-6; 28.8.2 channel switching <=500 us; 28.8.3 EVM <35% for QPSK/pi-4-DQPSK; 28.8.4 sensitivity (implementation-specific); 28.8.5 interference rejection; 28.8.6 max input level; 28.8.7 TX-to-RX <=5 symbols; 28.8.8 RX-to-TX <=5 symbols; 28.8.9 receiver ED; 28.8.10 LQI. RCC DSSS BPSK PHY (Clause 29): 29.1 overview (RCC use); 29.2 specification (reuses Clause 14 BPSK PHY with a new bit-to-chip mapping, Table 29-1). CMB PHY (Clause 30): 30.1.1 CMB O-QPSK PPDU format (general, preamble, SFD, PHR with Spreading Mode/Rate Mode/HCS, PSDU); 30.1.2 CMB O-QPSK modulation and coding ((16,4)/(8,4) DSSS, chip whitening m=9, raised-cosine roll-off 0.8); 30.1.3 CMB O-QPSK RF requirements (frequency range, PSD mask, sensitivity ~-85 dBm, turnaround, EVM <35%, ±40 ppm, >=-3 dBm, max input, ED, LQI, 8-symbol CCA). 30.2.1 CMB GFSK PPDU format (preamble up to 30x "01010101", 2-octet SFD signaling FEC, PHR with FCS Type/Data Whitening/Frame Length); 30.2.2 CMB GFSK modulation and coding (Gaussian filter BT=0.7, 2-FSK, five modes 50-200 kb/s, optional RSC/NRNSC FEC); 30.2.3 CMB GFSK data whitening (reuses Clause 20 scrambler); 30.2.4 CMB GFSK RF requirements (±20 ppm, sensitivity, symbol rate, stepped spectral mask, turnaround, >=-3 dBm, ED, LQI, CCA).
blocks.zh: RCC LMR PHY（第 28 章）：28.1 概述将 LMR-GMSK-9.6 kb/s 定为强制项及 Ack 时序基准。28.2 PPDU 格式 —— 28.2.1 总则（图 28-1）；28.2.2 SHR（表 28-1 按调制与 PHR 编码选值）；28.2.3 PHR（数据 FEC 类型、高字节先发的数据长度、CRC-8、编码时的六个 PHR FEC 尾比特）；28.2.4 PHY 载荷（可选载荷 FEC 尾、填充至交织块整数倍）；28.2.5 尾比特（GMSK 用三个零）。28.3 FEC（速率 1/2 卷积码，八进制多项式 133/171，通过删余得到 7/8、3/4、2/3）。28.4 交织器（FEC 开则开）。28.5 数据白化（可选 PN9，PHR 与 PSDU 之间不复位）。28.6 调制 —— 28.6.1 GMSK，28.6.2 4-FSK，28.6.3 QPSK，28.6.4 pi/4 DQPSK，28.6.5 DSSS DPSK（DBPSK/DQPSK，扩频长度 11-40，码片速率 300 kcps-4 Mcps）。28.7 参考调制器。28.8 RF 要求 —— 28.8.1 符号率容差 ±5e-6；28.8.2 信道切换 <=500 us；28.8.3 QPSK/pi-4-DQPSK 的 EVM <35%；28.8.4 灵敏度（取决于实现）；28.8.5 干扰抑制；28.8.6 最大输入电平；28.8.7 TX 到 RX <=5 符号；28.8.8 RX 到 TX <=5 符号；28.8.9 接收机 ED；28.8.10 LQI。RCC DSSS BPSK PHY（第 29 章）：29.1 概述（RCC 用途）；29.2 规范（复用第 14 章 BPSK PHY，仅替换比特到码片映射，表 29-1）。CMB PHY（第 30 章）：30.1.1 CMB O-QPSK PPDU 格式（总则、前导、SFD、含扩频模式/速率模式/HCS 的 PHR、PSDU）；30.1.2 CMB O-QPSK 调制与编码（(16,4)/(8,4) DSSS、码片白化 m=9、滚降 0.8 的升余弦）；30.1.3 CMB O-QPSK RF 要求（频率范围、PSD 模板、灵敏度约 -85 dBm、转换时间、EVM <35%、±40 ppm、>=-3 dBm、最大输入、ED、LQI、8 符号 CCA）。30.2.1 CMB GFSK PPDU 格式（前导最多 30 次 “01010101”、指示 FEC 的 2 八位组 SFD、含 FCS 类型/数据白化/帧长度的 PHR）；30.2.2 CMB GFSK 调制与编码（高斯滤波 BT=0.7、2-FSK、五种模式 50-200 kb/s、可选 RSC/NRNSC FEC）；30.2.3 CMB GFSK 数据白化（复用第 20 章扰码器）；30.2.4 CMB GFSK RF 要求（±20 ppm、灵敏度、符号率、阶梯式频谱模板、转换时间、>=-3 dBm、ED、LQI、CCA）。

cites.note: Clause 28 — RCC LMR PHY: overview, PPDU format, FEC, interleaver, whitening, modulation (GMSK/4-FSK/QPSK/pi-4 DQPSK/DSSS DPSK), reference modulator, RF requirements.
Clause 29 — RCC DSSS BPSK PHY: overview and specification reusing Clause 14 BPSK with a new bit-to-chip mapping (Table 29-1).
Clause 30 — CMB PHY: CMB O-QPSK (PPDU, modulation/coding, RF) and CMB GFSK (PPDU, modulation/coding, data whitening, RF).
